## CreateMarketResult type

The result of creating a market. Market and pool(if created) can be lazily extracted from events using the data function.

 P extends CreateMarketParams - Data will contain market and pool if params is with pool

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare type CreateMarketResult<C extends RpcContext<MS>, MS extends MetadataStorage = MetadataStorage, P extends CreateMarketParams<C, MS> = CreateMarketParams<C, MS>> = ExtractableResult<IEither<Error, CreateMarketData<C, MS, P>>>;
```
